title: deliberation config
description: User config for the deliberation MCP server. providers = transport/connection; models = named model records; routing = fan-out policy; consensus.arbiter = who synthesizes the verdict.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor validation and autocomplete.

providers.description: Per-provider CONNECTION config only (enable + auth/endpoint). Not where models live.

models.description: Named model records, keyed by id (^[a-z0-9-]+$, excluding the reserved "openrouter-default"). Each record names its provider and model slug. In v1 every record must target provider "openrouter".

propertyNames.description: Record id: lowercase letters/digits/hyphens, and not the reserved "openrouter-default".

maxFanout.description: Max number of OpenRouter delegates fanned out by /ask-all.

arbiter.description: Who synthesizes the consensus verdict: a shorthand string, or a dedicated model record by id.

oneOf.description: Shorthand: auto (pick a healthy voice), host (the host arbitrates), or a built-in provider.

model.description: id of one of THIS config's `models` records to use as the arbiter (a local record id, not an OpenRouter model slug). Any record qualifies, even askAll:false / consensus:false. An id that is not a configured record soft-degrades to "auto" at runtime with a warning.

blindVote.description: Run a blind arbiter pre-vote (the arbiter answers the question cold, before seeing peer opinions) to reduce anchoring. Server/concrete-arbiter mode only; adds one extra arbiter call.

maxRounds.description: Maximum rounds for the server-side convergence loop (consensus-auto / consensus-step) before returning UNRESOLVED. Positive integer 1-50 (values above 50 are clamped to 50); defaults to 5 when unset or invalid.

sessions.description: Opt-in per-session persistence (decision records + revisit + audit trail). Default OFF; nothing is written to disk unless persist is true.

persist.description: Persist consensus/ask-all runs to <cache>/deliberation/sessions/<id>.json (atomic write, mode 0600). Default OFF.

maxRecords.description: Keep at most this many newest records; older ones are trimmed after each write. Use -1 for unlimited (never trim by count).

maxAgeDays.description: Delete records older than this many days after each write. Use -1 for unlimited (never delete by age).

captureText.description: When true (AND persist is true), the session record additionally stores each provider's raw RESPONSE body (opinion text). Default OFF -> only the question, verdicts, and tagged-issue summaries are stored. Captured text is secret-scrubbed (mandatory) plus a best-effort PII strip (not a guarantee) and written as PLAINTEXT JSON on local disk. The metrics-only debug log NEVER receives body text regardless of this flag.

orientation.description: Opt-in auto-attach of a small repo orientation bundle (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/README/manifest) to file-blind advisory providers (Grok/OpenRouter) so they reach context parity with Codex/Gemini. Default OFF.

enabled.description: When true, dispatch auto-attaches existing high-signal repo files to Grok/OpenRouter (never to Codex/Gemini, which walk cwd). Default OFF.

maxFiles.description: Cap on how many orientation files to attach, in priority order.

debug.description: Opt-in debug log for performance debugging (per-provider latency, token counts, voting/approval outcomes). Default OFF. Never records prompts, responses, or issue descriptions.

enabled.description: Append one JSON line per provider call and per consensus round to the debug log. Default OFF.

path.description: Absolute path to the JSONL debug log file. When omitted, defaults to <cache>/deliberation/debug.jsonl (override via DELIBERATION_DEBUG_LOG).

simpleProvider.description: A CLI-managed provider (Codex, Gemini). Connection is handled by its CLI; only the enable flag applies.

apiKeyEnv.description: Env var holding the xAI API key.

openrouterProvider.description: OpenRouter connection config (advisory-only HTTP). Holds the keys specific to OpenRouter; named models live under the top-level models map.

apiKeyEnv.description: Env var holding the OpenRouter API key.

allowRawModel.description: Allow raw model slugs (not just configured records).

defaultModel.description: Model slug used for bare /ask-openrouter calls.

defaults.description: Per-call defaults applied to OpenRouter requests unless a record or call overrides them.

modelRecord.description: A named model record. provider + model are required.

provider.description: Transport for this record. Only "openrouter" is supported in v1 (codex/gemini/grok are CLI-managed / singleton built-ins).

experts.description: Restrict this record to specific experts. Absent = all experts.

apiBase.description: Override the provider apiBase for this record only.
